title: lomaria orbiculata
intro: Lomaria orbiculata, also known as the shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, and its leaves are used in herbal preparations to make teas, infusions, and poultices. In traditional medicine, Lomaria orbiculata is often used to treat various conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
